title: leptadenia lanceolata subsp. lanceolata
intro: Leptadenia lanceolata subsp. lanceolata, also known as the 'Long Spine or Jivanti', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Leptadenia lanceolata subsp. lanceolata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically dried and processed into a powder or decoction, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or other supplements.
